name: Contoso Global Retail — Fabric Domain Configuration
description: Defines the business domain hierarchy, workspace assignments, and endorsement policies for the Contoso Fabric tenant. Domains provide logical grouping of workspaces by business function to enable decentralized data governance.

domains.name: Retail Operations
domains.description: Core retail data platform covering ingestion, transformation, and warehousing for point-of-sale, inventory, and store operations data across 500 stores.

workspace_assignments.role: Data ingestion pipelines (ELT from POS, ERP, CRM)
Central warehouse and OLTP operational database

domains.name: Customer Intelligence
domains.description: Advanced analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence for customer segmentation, predictive modeling, and executive reporting.

workspace_assignments.role: ML models, experiments, and predictive analytics
Power BI reports, semantic models, and dashboards

domains.name: Supply Chain & Logistics
domains.description: Real-time streaming analytics for IoT sensor data, fleet tracking, warehouse monitoring, and supply chain event processing.

workspace_assignments.role: Eventhouse, KQL databases, eventstreams for IoT and logistics data

domains.name: Corporate Governance
domains.description: Data governance, compliance monitoring, AI agent orchestration, and platform administration. Houses governance policies, audit logs, and AI-powered data agents.

workspace_assignments.role: Data governance policies, lineage tracking, and compliance monitoring
AI agents for data Q&A, automated insights, and copilot experiences

sensitivity_labels.name: Internal
sensitivity_labels.description: Internal business data, not for external sharing

sensitivity_labels.name: Confidential
sensitivity_labels.description: Sensitive business data with restricted access

sensitivity_labels.name: Highly Confidential
sensitivity_labels.description: PII, financial, or regulated data with strict controls
